name: teamagent-marketplace
description: TeamBrain / TeamAgent marketplace: turns one Claude Code's mistake-then-correction into a rule that a new Claude Code is blocked from repeating, with CEO-readable proof artifacts.

plugins.name: teamagent-memory
plugins.description: Captures user-corrections from Stop events into rule cards and enforces them via PreToolUse blocks before a new Claude Code repeats the old mistake (e.g. moment->dayjs).

plugins.name: teamagent-proof-console
plugins.description: Generates a CEO-readable proof-of-work packet (transcript, rule card, hook event, before/after diff) showing 'previous Claude made this mistake, new Claude tried to repeat it, TeamAgent blocked it'.

plugins.name: teamagent-team-sync
plugins.description: Promotes a personal rule into a team-shared rule, syncs the team rule pack on SessionStart, and resolves conflicts when the same trigger has divergent corrections.
